世.wiki_summary: Wiktionary describes 世 as a phonetic borrowing (假借) derived from 葉 (leaf) via iterative devoicing, representing successive foliages extended to mean 'generations' — not a simple indicative character.
世.difference: Our data classifies 世 as simple_indicative (指事), but Wiktionary identifies it as a phonetic borrowing (假借) from 葉, with no indicative component analysis.

位.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 亻 (person) + phonetic 立 (to stand), meaning the place or rank one occupies.

次.wiki_summary: Wiktionary classifies 次 as a pictogram depicting a person exhaling, noting the Shuowen's phono-semantic analysis does not accord with the ancient forms.
次.difference: Our data classifies 次 as phono_semantic_compound (从欠，二声), but Wiktionary identifies it as a pictograph of a person exhaling, explicitly rejecting the phono-semantic analysis as inconsistent with ancient forms.

度.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 又 (hand) + phonetic 石 (later corrupted to 𲟁), relating to hand-span measurement; Shuowen's 庶-as-phonetic analysis is noted but not the primary reconstruction.
度.difference: Both agree on phono_semantic_compound, but our note names 庶 as the phonetic component while Wiktionary's primary reconstruction identifies 石 as the phonetic (with 庶 noted as a secondary Shuowen interpretation).

任.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 亻 (person) + phonetic 壬, originally depicting someone carrying a load and bearing responsibility.

常.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 巾 (cloth) + phonetic 尚, originally meaning a lower garment before being borrowed to mean 'long-lasting; frequent'.

先.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 止 (foot) + 儿 (person), representing a foot going ahead of a person to mean 'to go forward; before'.

海.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 氵 (water) + phonetic 每, probably related to 晦 (darkness/obscurity) as the sea was described in Zhou texts.

通.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 辶 (movement) + phonetic 甬, meaning to pass through or penetrate.

教.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 爻 + semantic 子 (child) + semantic 攵 (teaching cane), representing the act of teaching a child.
